Package noppes.npcs.api.ability.type

Interface IAbilityProjectile

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IAbility, IAbilityAction
    public interface IAbilityProjectile
extends IAbility
    API interface for Projectile abilities. Ranged projectile attacks.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods

        Returns:

        Returns:

        Returns:

      • getProjectileType

        String getProjectileType()
        Returns:
        The projectile type identifier (e.g. arrow, snowball).

        void setProjectileType​(String type)
        Parameters:
        type - Projectile type identifier.

      • isExplosive

        boolean isExplosive()
        Returns:
        Whether the projectile explodes on impact.

      • setExplosive

        void setExplosive​(boolean explosive)
        Parameters:
        explosive - Whether to explode on impact.

      • getExplosionRadius

        float getExplosionRadius()
        Returns:
        Explosion radius in blocks.

      • setExplosionRadius

        void setExplosionRadius​(float radius)
        Parameters:
        radius - Explosion radius in blocks.

      • isHoming

        boolean isHoming()
        Returns:
        Whether the projectile tracks its target.

      • setHoming

        void setHoming​(boolean homing)
        Parameters:
        homing - Whether to track the target.

      • getHomingStrength

        float getHomingStrength()
        Returns:
        Homing turn strength (higher = tighter turns).

      • setHomingStrength

        void setHomingStrength​(float strength)
        Parameters:
        strength - Homing turn strength.
